info.title: snitch
info.description: Shows transitive package dependencies that can be removed

options.name: --tfm
options.description: The target framework moniker to analyze

options.name: --exclude
options.description: One or more packages to exclude

options.name: --skip
options.description: One or more project references to exclude

options.name: --strict
options.description:
Returns exit code 0 only if no conflicts were
found

options.name: --no-prerelease
options.description:
Verifies that all package references are not
pre-releases
